## Type of change

- [ ] New feature

## Documentation checklist

> **Important:** mark explicitly. If something doesn't apply, mark it N/A and briefly explain why.

- [ ] `README.md` is still accurate (or was updated)
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` is still accurate (or was updated)
- [ ] `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` is still accurate (or was updated)
- [ ] `docs/SPEC.md` is still accurate (or was updated)
- [ ] This change does **not** warrant a new ADR in `docs/decisions/` (or one was added)
- [ ] Commands in `README.md` still work

## Technical checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Linter passes
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or they are justified below)
- [ ] No secrets/credentials committed
